name: linktree
description: Self-hosted Linktree using Cloudflare Pages + Workers + D1

scripts.dev: wrangler pages dev public --d1=DB --binding ADMIN_SECRET_KEY=dev-secret --binding ALLOWED_ADMIN_IP=0.0.0.0
scripts.db:init:miniflare: for f in .wrangler/state/v3/d1/miniflare-D1DatabaseObject/*.sqlite; do sqlite3 "$f" < schema.sql && echo "Seeded: $f"; done
